items.title: Tandridge District Council v John Brien & Ors [2026] EWHC 547 (KB)
items.description: High Court (King's Bench Division) judgement concerning the Oxted area. Citation: [2026] EWHC 547 (KB). Full text available at the link.
items.headline: High Court Rules in Council Case Linked to Oxted
items.summary: The High Court has issued a judgement in a case brought by Tandridge District Council against John Brien and others, concerning the Oxted area. The full ruling, listed as [2026] EWHC 547 (KB), is available to read online.
